$comment: Tracked Claude Code session config for os-rebuild. The session BOOTS THE SEALED OS: statusLine + UserPromptSubmit run via .system/bin/os-boot.mjs from .system/releases/current (channel file .system/state/channel); SessionStart prints the boot banner (os-publish --boot-check). PreToolUse guards run from the workbench: confinement (LOCKDOWN: sibling blocklist + fail-CLOSED write allowlist) + harness-lock (single-writer per component). Loop hooks stay fail-open for availability; guards fail closed on their verdicts. Wired candidates are still candidates (governance/rules/harness-admission.md). Hooks load at session start - open THIS folder as the project.
